evals.prompt: I need to plan a new user authentication feature for my app. Can you run /shape-spec to help me structure this?
evals.expected_output: Should run shape-spec command workflow, asking user about scope, visuals, references, checking product context, and creating a spec folder structure

evals.prompt: I want to set up product documentation for my project. Run /plan-product to create mission, roadmap, and tech-stack files.
evals.expected_output: Should run plan-product workflow, checking for existing docs, gathering product vision, roadmap, and tech stack info

evals.prompt: We have some inconsistent patterns in our API responses. Run /discover-standards to document them.
evals.expected_output: Should run discover-standards workflow, analyzing API code, presenting findings, and creating standard files

evals.prompt: I'm working on a new API endpoint, run /inject-standards to get the relevant standards in context
evals.expected_output: Should run inject-standards in auto-suggest mode, reading index.yml, analyzing context, and suggesting relevant standards
